_comment: Per-model parameter constraints for Human-in-the-Loop tool-call editing. Keyed by tool name, then by model. 'args' maps the unified (generic) arg names from tool_registry.py to the REAL value range/type of the underlying model (extracted from each model's card.md/adapter.yaml). Params a model does NOT support are omitted from that model's entry. quality_tier only affects model='auto' routing, so it appears only on the 'auto' entry. writable=false means the field is fixed/control-only and should not be exposed for editing. model_specific is a free-form passthrough dict (passthrough=true): its 'fields' map lists the documented per-model sub-keys with their ranges; users may still pass additional undocumented keys.

generate_video.note: Unified tool schema from GenerateVideoInput. Model not yet fixed; ranges are the union enum/limits of the unified schema, not a specific model. Once a model is chosen, switch to that model's entry for the real per-model ranges.

duration_seconds.note: -1 = smart/auto duration (WAN 2.0 / Doubao Seedance 1.5 Pro); Seedance caps explicit durations at 12; HappyHorse requires explicit 4-15

quality_tier.note: router selection preference; no effect once a specific model is chosen

model_specific.note: documented sub-fields depend on the resolved model; see that model's entry

aspect_ratio.note: 21:9 and adaptive NOT supported; 4:5 and 5:4 available only via model_specific

resolution.note: 480p NOT supported (adapter rejects); value is uppercased to 720P/1080P for the API

model_specific.note: 4:5 / 5:4 aspect ratios can only be set here (1080P is now reachable via the unified resolution arg)

generate_video.note: Text-to-video. Nested input envelope: input={prompt}, no media. Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark.

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: Image-to-video; first_frame required. input.media=[{type:first_frame,url}]. Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark.

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: Reference-to-video; requires >=1 reference_video or reference_image. input.media carries type=reference_video then reference_image (prompt refers to them as 视频1/图片3). Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark / first_frame / reference_audios.

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

reference_videos.note: mapped to media type=reference_video (listed before reference images)

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: Video edit; requires exactly 1 source video in reference_videos (mapped to media type=video) plus optional reference_images. Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark / first_frame / reference_audios.

prompt.note: edit instruction, e.g. 将视频中女孩的衣服替换为图片中的衣服

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

reference_videos.note: the single source video to edit (mapped to media type=video); required

reference_images.note: reference images driving the edit (mapped to media type=reference_image)

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: Text-to-video. Flat input envelope: input={prompt} (no media array). Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark.

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: Image-to-video; first_frame required. Flat input: first_frame->input.img_url and optional reference_audios[0]->input.audio_url (audio-driven, e.g. rap). No media array. Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark / last_frame / reference_images / reference_videos.

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

reference_audios.note: optional driving audio; first entry mapped to input.audio_url

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: Reference-to-video; requires >=1 reference_video or reference_image. Flat input: reference_videos + reference_images merged (videos first) into a single input.reference_urls list (no per-item type tags). Does not use aspect_ratio / with_audio / watermark / first_frame / reference_audios.

prompt.note: may refer to reference subjects as character1, etc.

resolution.note: value is uppercased to 480P/720P/1080P for the API

reference_videos.note: merged into input.reference_urls (listed before reference images)

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level; no documented sub-fields

generate_video.note: API-identical to WAN 2.0 (shares SeedanceVideoAdapter); full capability set incl. first/last frame, multimodal reference, video edit/extend, audio.
API-identical to WAN 2.0 (shares SeedanceVideoAdapter); faster/cheaper. Unlike wan-2-0-fast it has no documented 1080p text-to-video restriction.

API-identical to WAN 2.0 (shares SeedanceVideoAdapter); high-cost-performance tier, cheapest of the Seedance 2.0 family. Full capability set incl. first/last frame, multimodal reference, video edit/extend, audio.
Image-to-video variant of HappyHorse (shares the t2v adapter's validation): a first_frame, or up to 9 reference_images (mutually exclusive).

aspect_ratio.note: 21:9 and adaptive NOT supported; 4:5 and 5:4 available only via model_specific

resolution.note: 480p NOT supported (adapter rejects); value is uppercased to 720P/1080P for the API

model_specific.note: 4:5 / 5:4 aspect ratios can only be set here

generate_video.note: Reference-to-video variant of HappyHorse (shares the t2v adapter's validation): up to 9 reference_images.

aspect_ratio.note: 21:9 and adaptive NOT supported; 4:5 and 5:4 available only via model_specific

resolution.note: 480p NOT supported (adapter rejects); value is uppercased to 720P/1080P for the API

model_specific.note: 4:5 / 5:4 aspect ratios can only be set here

generate_video.note: Natural-language video editing: 1 source video (reference_videos) + up to 5 reference_images. Output duration/ratio follow the source video, so duration_seconds and aspect_ratio are NOT sent.

resolution.note: 480p NOT supported (adapter rejects); value is uppercased to 720P/1080P for the API

reference_videos.note: the single source video to edit (required)

generate_video.note: Text-to-video only. resolution + aspect_ratio are mapped to a pixel size (adaptive -> 16:9); quality_tier maps to Kling mode (best -> pro, else std) and IS meaningful here. Does not use with_audio / watermark / reference media.

aspect_ratio.note: adaptive treated as 16:9; mapped with resolution to a pixel size

resolution.note: mapped with aspect_ratio to a pixel size string

quality_tier.note: maps to Kling mode: best -> pro, fast/balanced -> std

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level (can override size/mode/seconds); no documented sub-fields

generate_video.displayName: Kling V3 Omni (可灵 V3 全能版)
generate_video.note: Text-to-video only (shares KlingVideoAdapter with O1). resolution + aspect_ratio map to a pixel size (adaptive -> 16:9); quality_tier maps to Kling mode (best -> pro, else std). Does not use with_audio / watermark / reference media.

aspect_ratio.note: adaptive treated as 16:9; mapped with resolution to a pixel size

resolution.note: mapped with aspect_ratio to a pixel size string

quality_tier.note: maps to Kling mode: best -> pro, fast/balanced -> std

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough merged at top level (can override size/mode/seconds); no documented sub-fields

generate_image.note: Unified tool schema from GenerateImageInput. Model not yet fixed; ranges are the union enum/limits of the unified schema, not a specific model. Once a model is chosen, switch to that model's entry for the real per-model ranges.

n.note: group/sequential image count (组图); only doubao-seedream-* support n>1, other image models generate 1

quality_tier.note: router selection preference; no effect once a specific model is chosen

watermark.note: null = use resolved model's default; ignored by gpt-image-2 / nano-banana

model_specific.note: documented sub-fields depend on the resolved model; see that model's entry

aspect_ratio.note: maps to size hint; output ratio range [1/16, 16]

n.note: group/sequential image count (组图); drives sequential_image_generation; input ref images + generated <= 15

watermark.note: null = use model default (true); adds an "AI generated" watermark

aspect_ratio.note: maps to size hint; output ratio range [1/16, 16]

n.note: group/sequential image count (组图); drives sequential_image_generation; input ref images + generated <= 15

watermark.note: null = use model default (true); adds an "AI generated" watermark

aspect_ratio.note: maps to size hint; output ratio range [1/16, 16]

n.note: group/sequential image count (组图); drives sequential_image_generation; input ref images + generated <= 15

watermark.note: null = use model default (false); adds an "AI generated" watermark

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough to the API; no documented sub-fields
free-form passthrough to the API; no documented sub-fields
free-form passthrough to the API; no documented sub-fields

generate_image.note: Shares NanoBanana adapter with nano-banana-pro; same parameters, official channel.

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough to the API; no documented sub-fields

generate_image.note: Shares NanoBanana adapter with nano-banana-pro; same parameters, premium channel.

model_specific.note: free-form passthrough to the API; no documented sub-fields

generate_audio.note: Unified tool schema from GenerateAudioInput (text-to-speech). Model not yet fixed; ranges are the union of the unified schema, not a specific model. Once a model is chosen, switch to that model's entry — seed-tts-2-0 ignores speed/volume/pitch/emotion/bitrate.

voice.note: voice/speaker id; null = each model's own default. MiniMax uses voice ids (e.g. male-qn-qingse); seed-tts uses speaker ids (e.g. zh_female_xiaohe_uranus_bigtts). See each model's card for the full list

sample_rate.note: output sample rate in Hz (e.g. 24000, 32000); null = model default

bitrate.note: output bitrate in bps (MiniMax only, e.g. 128000); null = model default

emotion.note: emotion hint, e.g. happy/sad/angry (MiniMax only); null lets the model infer from text

quality_tier.note: router selection preference; no effect once a specific model is chosen

model_specific.note: documented sub-fields depend on the resolved model; see that model's entry

generate_audio.note: Synchronous text-to-speech, high-fidelity tier. Supports the full MiniMax voice-control set (speed/volume/pitch/emotion/bitrate). Billed per character.

text.note: text to synthesize (required); supports inline emotion/event tags like (laughs)

voice.note: maps to input.voice_setting.voice_id; 327 system voices across 中文/粤语/英/日/韩/西/葡/法 etc. — see card.md for the full list

emotion.note: maps to input.voice_setting.emotion (e.g. happy/sad/angry); null = auto-infer

model_specific.note: merged at the top of input; other direct MiniMax fields

generate_audio.note: Synchronous text-to-speech; faster/cheaper Turbo tier. Inherits minimax-speech-2-8-hd: identical parameters and request structure, only the model id differs.

text.note: text to synthesize (required); supports inline emotion/event tags like (laughs)

voice.note: maps to input.voice_setting.voice_id; 327 system voices — see minimax-speech-2-8-hd card.md for the full list

emotion.note: maps to input.voice_setting.emotion (e.g. happy/sad/angry); null = auto-infer

model_specific.note: merged at the top of input; other direct MiniMax fields

generate_audio.note: Asynchronous text-to-speech (submit then poll). 122 expressive Chinese system voices (角色扮演/有声阅读/客服/视频配音), emotion + ASMR support. Only voice / audio_format / sample_rate are used — speed/volume/pitch/emotion/bitrate are MiniMax-only and ignored here.

voice.note: maps to req_params.speaker; *_uranus_bigtts voices support 情感变化/指令遵循/ASMR — see card.md for the full list

model_specific.note: merged at the top of req_params; other direct seed-tts fields

understand_vision.note: Unified tool schema from UnderstandVisionInput. Vision-language: returns a TEXT answer (not media). Always synchronous — no task_id, no wait/timeout. prompt is required even when media is attached.

images.note: public image URLs; multiple images reasoned over jointly

video.note: a single public video URL (long video supported)

system_prompt.note: null = generic 'You are a helpful assistant.'

max_tokens.note: max output tokens; null = model default

return_metadata.note: include token usage; the answer and reasoning_content are always returned

model_specific.note: documented sub-fields depend on the resolved model; see that model's entry

understand_vision.note: Vision-language understanding/reasoning over images & video (Thinking variant: also returns reasoning_content). Synchronous via OpenAI-compatible /model/v1/chat/completions; 128K context. Returns text, not media — no wait/timeout/watermark.

images.note: maps to messages[user].content[].image_url.url; multiple images reasoned over jointly

video.note: maps to messages[user].content[].video_url.url; single video, long video supported

system_prompt.note: maps to messages[system].content; null = 'You are a helpful assistant.'

max_tokens.note: maps to max_tokens; null = model default

temperature.note: maps to temperature; null = model default

return_metadata.note: include usage; choices[0].message.reasoning_content is returned when true

model_specific.note: merged at the top level of the chat/completions request
